2144580.name: Super Bio-Man
2144580.description:
Super Bio-Man is the ultimate gunslinger and the guardian of our galaxy.
Using his arsenal and metal fist, he shows the invaders from outer space - who's the boss here.

Super Bio-Man is a hand-drawn, hand-crafted, fast-paced 3D-action, paying homage to our beloved old-school games such as DooM, Quake, Serious Sam, Crimsonland and others.

No AI was involved in creation of this project (as far as we can remember...)
2144580.supported_languages:
俄语*, 英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
